channel.title: Gas on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Gas on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Guyana Daily Brief – Wednesday, April 8, 2026
item.description: Guyana pockets US$761M in oil revenue, denies secret payout to gas contractor, and a cop on video says 'I'll kill you.' Wednesday, April 8.

item.title: The Trini Dispatch – April 8, 2026
item.description: PM Kamla sending a delegation to Venezuela to get T&T's gas back. Patrice Roberts ordered to pay. CARICOM drama continues. Dry sardonic Port of Spain perspective.
